title: YDM's coreX Library
description: Library mod for creating mods with less forge and minecraft code.
body:
#### This libary mod is needed for some of my mods.

 

#### Unique item names

Items from mods that use the unique name functions from this library mod are created with a random name.

These random names are divided into 6 quality type.

 

And these names change the attributes of the item and the player when there are equipped.

They also can give you some on-hit and passive effects.

 

The item attributes, effects, rarity chance, can be changed in the ydmscorex common config.

 

#### Statistics and effects are

-weapon damage

-attack speed

-knockback

-armor

-armor toughness

-knockback resistance

-movement speed

-on-hit effect(s)

-passive effect(s).

 

Currently there are 62 random names for the items that are made with this.
